
```{r}
#install.packages(c("tidyverse", "lme4", "lmerTest", "broom.mixed", "ggeffects", "modelsummary", "multcomp", "emmeans", "osfr", "performance", "DHARMa", "simr", "haven", "patchwork", "archive", "pandoc"))

library(osfr)
library(archive)
```


```{r}
# =========================================================
# Data Download and Preparation Script
# This script downloads all required datasets from OSF,
# extracts ZIP archives, and keeps only the relevant files
# for the empirical analysis.
# =========================================================

# Create directory for raw data (if it does not already exist)
dir.create("data_raw", showWarnings = FALSE)

# =========================================================
# 1. Download individual datasets from OSF
# =========================================================

files <- list(
  study3 = list(
    id   = "sd643",                    # https://osf.io/sd643/
    dest = "data_raw/Study_3_data.csv"
  ),
  study4 = list(
    id   = "5ta42",                    # https://osf.io/5ta42/
    dest = "data_raw/Study_4_data.csv"
  ),
  study5 = list(
    id   = "nu3qp",                    # https://osf.io/nu3qp/
    dest = "data_raw/Study_5_data.csv"
  ),
  trustworthiness = list(
    id   = "39s8a",                    # https://osf.io/39s8a/
    dest = "data_raw/trustworthiness_rating.dta"
  )
)

# Download each file only if it does not already exist locally
for (f in files) {
  if (!file.exists(f$dest)) {
    message(sprintf("Downloading %s to %s ...", f$id, f$dest))

    # Retrieve OSF file object
    osf_file <- osf_retrieve_file(f$id)

    # Download into data_raw
    res <- osf_download(
      osf_file,
      path      = dirname(f$dest),
      conflicts = "overwrite",
      progress  = FALSE,
      verbose   = FALSE
    )

    # Local path from osf_download result
    downloaded_path <- res$local_path[1]

    # Optionally rename to desired filename
    if (!identical(
      normalizePath(downloaded_path),
      normalizePath(f$dest, mustWork = FALSE)
    )) {
      file.rename(downloaded_path, f$dest)
    }

    message(sprintf("Finished: %s", f$dest))
  } else {
    message(sprintf("File already exists, skipping: %s", f$dest))
  }
}

# =========================================================
# 2. Download and extract ZIP archive (TFC dataset)
# =========================================================

zip_id   <- "qwucj"
zip_path <- "data_raw/TFC_April2023.zip"

if (!file.exists(zip_path)) {
  message(sprintf("Downloading ZIP %s to %s ...", zip_id, zip_path))

  osf_zip <- osf_retrieve_file(zip_id)

  res_zip <- osf_download(
    osf_zip,
    path      = dirname(zip_path),
    conflicts = "overwrite",
    progress  = FALSE,
    verbose   = FALSE
  )

  downloaded_zip_path <- res_zip$local_path[1]

  if (!identical(
    normalizePath(downloaded_zip_path),
    normalizePath(zip_path, mustWork = FALSE)
  )) {
    file.rename(downloaded_zip_path, zip_path)
  }

  message(sprintf("Finished: %s", zip_path))
} else {
  message(sprintf("ZIP archive already exists, skipping download: %s", zip_path))
}

# =========================================================
# 3. Select only relevant files from extracted archive
# =========================================================

unzipped_dir <- "data_raw/TFC_April2023"

# Only extract if not already done
if (!dir.exists(unzipped_dir)) {
  dir.create(unzipped_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
  archive_extract(zip_path, dir = unzipped_dir)
}

target_path <- "data_raw"
#Sys.sleep(15)
# List all files recursively
all_files <- list.files(unzipped_dir, recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)
all_files <- all_files[file.info(all_files)$isdir == FALSE]

# Patterns for relevant meta-analysis files
patterns <- c(
  "Exp1_Share_Meta\\.csv",
  "Exp2_Share_Meta\\.csv",
  "Exp3_Share_Meta\\.csv",
  "1_Share_Meta\\.csv"
)

# Filter files that contain one of the patterns
selected_files <- all_files[
  grepl(paste(patterns, collapse = "|"), all_files)
]

# Copy selected files into the main data directory
for (f in selected_files) {
  file.copy(f, file.path(target_path, basename(f)), overwrite = TRUE)
}

# =========================================================
# 4. Clean up intermediate files
# =========================================================

#Remove extracted directory
unlink(unzipped_dir, recursive = TRUE, force = TRUE)

#Remove ZIP archive (if you do not want to keep it)
unlink(zip_path, force = TRUE)
```
